axiomatic_core.definition: Invariant logical premises applied unconditionally before any reasoning step

safety_core.definition: Fail-closed safety gates, validators, and governance enforcement modules

inference_core.definition: Logical inference, symbolic reasoning, and deduction engines

semantic_core.definition: Semantic context handlers and meaning-extraction scaffolding

planning_core.definition: Goal decomposition, task sequencing, and plan representation

agent_orchestration_core.definition: Agent lifecycle control, dispatch, and policy decision modules

numeric_core.definition: Deterministic mathematical and algebraic computation modules

memory_core.definition: Persistent-state access, knowledge catalog, and storage interfaces

protocol_core.definition: System-level runtime protocol, orchestration, and bootstrap modules
